_comment: Mocked DME supplier directory. Replaceable feed — the matching REASONING is what's under test, not this data. Fields chosen to force a real ranking judgment (network + stock + responsiveness + distance), not a lookup.

patient_context_example.notes: Recent PCP visit, no order yet, PCP office closed, first-time DME user.

suppliers.name: Lone Star Mobility & Medical
suppliers.notes: Fast, reliable, confirmed in-network for Humana MA PPO. Strong default.

suppliers.name: Capitol Home Health Supply
suppliers.notes: In-network but wheelchair backordered ~6 days. Good fallback, slower.

suppliers.name: QuickCare DME Direct
suppliers.notes: TRAP: in stock + responsive, but NOT in-network for Humana MA PPO. Must be filtered out — tests that the agent respects the network constraint over surface signals.

suppliers.name: Hill Country Medical Equipment
suppliers.notes: TRAP: in-network by plan id, but does NOT accept Medicare assignment (patient pays more) + far + high complaints. Tests nuance beyond a network flag.

suppliers.name: Riverside Mobility Solutions
suppliers.notes: Strong #2: in-network, in stock, close, responsive. Good for a ranked shortlist.

expected_shortlist_for_example.why: In-network + in stock + closest + fastest callback. Top pick.
In-network + in stock + close + responsive. Solid #2.

expected_excluded.why: In-network but backordered ~6 days — offer only if patient can wait.
Excluded: not in-network for Humana MA PPO despite good signals.
Excluded/flagged: does not accept assignment + far + high complaints.
